compiled_state.title: ticket-transition.sh: large ticket repos -> pre-flock open-children scan hangs (O(n) reducer subprocesses)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
ticket-transition.sh performs a sequential scan of ALL ticket directories (16,636+) to find open children before the flock. For tickets lacking snapshots (13,526 of 16,636), this invokes a reducer subprocess (~35ms each), totaling ~473 seconds. This makes ticket transitions for leaf node tasks timeout (30s flock limit fires before scan completes).

Root cause: The pre-flock check uses os.scandir(tracker_dir) over all tickets rather than querying the dependency graph for direct children.

Fix: Use ticket-graph children lookup (already available) for the pre-flock open-children check, which traverses only known children rather than scanning all tickets.
